title: nasha' #5378
definition:
1) to lend on interest or usury, be a creditor
    1a) (Qal) creditor (participle)
    1b) (Hiphil) to act as a creditor
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to lend on interest or usury, be a creditor
    1a) (Qal) creditor (participle)
    1b) (Hiphil) to act as a creditor

    NASB:  to beguile, deceive
